summary: Open draft PR titled "zako matches" with a broad 71-file diff across camera, fighter, ground, item, library, game-mode, and menu code. Evidence shows several decomp placeholder replacements and prototype/header cleanups, but the loaded bot report also shows severe global regressions and the only human comment says the branch touches too many files and conflicts must be resolved manually. Treat this PR as mixed-quality intake evidence, not as accepted matching precedent.

key_files.role: Replaced Camera_8002C1A8 placeholder with a function body handling pause camera inputs, movement, zoom, rotation, and slot switching.
Updated Camera_8002C1A8 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void).

Refactored include order, renamed fn_800DAEEC surface to ftCo_CapturePulledHi_Coll, changed helper wrapping, added narrow dont_inline pragmas, preserved PAD_STACK, and modernized a K&R-style definition.
Small motion-state enum adjustments and formatting around an existing fake-match comma-operator comment.
Added duplicate placeholder comments for ftKb_SpecialNMt_80106F9C and ftKb_SpecialNMt_80106FEC.
Added several Popo SpecialAirHi functions using temporary local dat_attr structs with padding and repeated partner-position lookup logic.
Largest changed source file in metadata; exact local diff details are not loaded beyond file stats.
Large item-source change in metadata; exact local diff details are not loaded beyond file stats.
Large item-source change in metadata; exact local diff details are not loaded beyond file stats.
Large item-source change in metadata; exact local diff details are not loaded beyond file stats.
Large item-source change in metadata; exact local diff details are not loaded beyond file stats.
Changed fighter source file listed in metadata.
Changed fighter source file listed in metadata; bot report names ftCo_800D4E50 and ftCo_800D4F24 as new matches.
Changed ground source file listed in metadata.
Changed item common header listed in metadata.

what_changed: The PR metadata lists 71 changed files with 2219 additions and 249 deletions.
The diff replaces the Camera_8002C1A8 placeholder with a C implementation and updates its header prototype to void Camera_8002C1A8(void).

ftCo_Attack100.c includes cleanup, function-name/prototype changes, direct call cleanup for it_80291F14, added #pragma dont_inline push/pop blocks, retained PAD_STACK uses, and converted fn_800DBED4 from old-style parameter syntax to a typed prototype.
ftPp_SpecialS.c adds multiple Popo SpecialAirHi-related implementations and temporary padded dat-attribute structs.
The bot report claims 190 new matches and 62 improvements, but also reports 1637 broken matches, 919 regressions in unmatched items, and large negative matched-code and matched-data totals.
A human issue comment says a prior merge strategy would not work because the diff touches too many files and conflicts need manual resolution.

smart_moves.text: When a decompiled body establishes a signature, the PR updates the owning header rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS, as shown by Camera_8002C1A8.
The PR narrows some codegen steering with local #pragma push/#pragma dont_inline on/#pragma pop blocks around individual helpers rather than applying a file-wide pragma.
The PR removes an unnecessary function-pointer cast before calling it_80291F14 directly, improving call readability where the prototype appears usable.

decomp_lessons.text: A PR can contain local decomp progress while being unsuitable as global precedent if the report shows broad unrelated regressions; preserve the local facts but do not infer accepted matching quality from the title alone.

Temporary padded structs can expose dat_attr offsets for matching, but in this PR they are local bridge types with anonymous x84/x88/x8C/x90/xA8/xAC fields, so curator review should avoid promoting semantic field names from them.

Codegen tactics such as PAD_STACK, dont_inline pragmas, and fake-match comma operators require narrow verifier evidence before being treated as reviewable style; this PR contains those tactics but the loaded evidence does not include objdiff proof for each use.

naming_conventions.text: Use semantic names only where supported by nearby source context: the PR changes fn_800DAEEC to ftCo_CapturePulledHi_Coll, but the evidence only supports recording that this rename was made, not that the name was accepted.
Temporary dat_attr bridge structs in the Popo diff use offset-style field names such as x84, x88, x8C, and x90, reflecting uncertain semantics rather than invented names.
Camera_8002C1A8 locals use role-oriented names such as zoom_dir, move_x, move_y, rotate_x, rotate_y, stick_x, stick_y, and substick_x/substick_y.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Camera_8002C1A8 uses a local stack wrapper struct with an 8-byte pad before CameraInputs, suggesting stack-shape steering in the decompiled function.
ftCo_Attack100.c retains PAD_STACK(8) in ItemScope rapid animation functions and PAD_STACK(4) in fn_800DBED4.
ftCo_Attack100.c adds narrowly scoped #pragma dont_inline blocks around fn_800DAA40, fn_800DAD18, and fn_800DB5D8.
ftKb_SpecialN.c contains an explicit comment, "FAKE MATCH: comma operator required for regalloc," around a comma-operator expression.
ftPp_SpecialS.c uses temporary padded structs to access fighter dat_attrs at specific offsets.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: A merge strategy using git merge -s ours was abandoned because the diff between the branch and master touched too many different files; conflicts need manual resolution.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Automated report showed severe regression noise: matched code -11.05%, linked code -7.00%, matched data -4.39%, 1637 broken matches, and 919 regressions in unmatched items, despite also listing 190 new matches.

follow_up_queries: PR 2238 ftPp_SpecialS ftPpAirHiPhysAttrs dat_attrs x8C x90

notes: The PR is open and draft in raw_pr_json; merged_at is null.
The loaded raw diff is truncated, so only the visible hunks can support file-specific tactics beyond changed-file metadata.
There are no loaded review comments and no formal reviewer approval.
The bot report contains both many claimed new matches and very large regressions, so matching claims should not be treated as clean validation.
The human comment indicates conflict/manual-resolution problems, limiting confidence in branch-wide conclusions.
Changed-file metadata is complete for the listed 71 files, but many files have no loaded diff excerpt.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not promote broad draft-PR match claims when automated reports show large regressions
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2238 shows local decomp edits and bot-listed new matches, but its loaded report also shows massive broken-match/regression counts and a human comment about manual conflict resolution. Curate any file-level observations only with explicit evidence and avoid treating the PR as accepted matching precedent.

source_update_candidates.title: Historical PR intake should flag broad branch regressions before extracting reusable tactics
source_update_candidates.text: When an open or draft decomp PR has many touched files and an automated report with widespread broken matches/regressions, source updates should require narrow file/function validation before accepting tactics such as pragmas, PAD_STACK, fake-match expressions, or temporary padded structs as reusable precedent.
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards already require evidence for matching tactics, but this PR is a useful candidate example of why broad draft-branch reports should be treated as weak support.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2238 touched many systems, with largest visible metadata changes in grzakogenerator, camera, item, and Popo sources
source_update_candidates.text: Changed-file metadata for PR 2238 lists 71 files; largest additions include src/melee/gr/grzakogenerator.c (+332/-9), src/melee/cm/camera.c (+166/-1), src/melee/it/items/itoldkuri.c (+148/-9), src/melee/it/items/itwhitebea.c (+147/-8), src/melee/it/items/itoldottosea.c (+132/-4), src/melee/it/items/itlugia.c (+125/-6), and src/melee/ft/chara/ftPopo/ftPp_SpecialS.c (+117/-2).
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful as a searchable historical path fact, but should remain candidate-only because PR is open/draft and conflict-heavy.

rejection_notes: Do not record PR 2238 as merged or accepted; evidence says OPEN/draft and merged_at null.
Do not claim Camera_8002C1A8 fully matched; bot report only lists it as an unmatched-item improvement from 92.23% to 97.84%, not a 100% new match.
Do not promote the PR's #pragma dont_inline, PAD_STACK, fake-match comma operator, or temporary padded dat_attr structs as generally accepted style without separate objdiff/build evidence.
Do not infer reviewer intent from the lack of review comments.
Do not use changed-file metadata alone to describe exact function-level changes for files whose diff hunks were not loaded.
